extortion.description: Founded in 1949 with locations in Santa Monica, Pasadena and North Hollywood, Snyder Diamond is a progressive, design-forward kitchen and bath showroom steeped in tradition. Our knowledge, service and selection sets us high above the competition. Snyder Diamond is an authorized dealer of such brands as Hansgrohe, Sub Zero Wolf, Miele, Rohl, Fantini, Dornbracht, Kalamazoo Outdoor Gourmet, Victoria + Albert, TopBrewer, Viking and more.
